fleet-ghost.heading: Rolls-Royce Ghost Rental in Dubai — Series II & Black Badge
fleet-ghost.quickAnswer: Rent a Rolls-Royce Ghost in Dubai from AED 3,800/day, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai and 24/7 WhatsApp booking.
keyFacts: Rolls-Royce Ghost rental in Dubai starts at AED 3,800 per day; hourly hire is available from AED 800 (2-hour minimum).
Available chauffeur-driven or self-drive for qualifying renters, with free delivery across Dubai including Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR, Business Bay and DIFC.
Book 24/7 via WhatsApp or phone +971 55 816 4922, or email info@rollsroycers.com; service is multilingual (English, Arabic, Russian).
Discounted weekly and monthly long-term rates are offered; operated by Naqra FZE (Sharjah Publishing City Free Zone, License 4425576.01).
body: Book a Rolls-Royce Ghost rental in Dubai from AED 3,800 per day and glide through the city in the most driver-focused Rolls-Royce. Available in Series II and the bolder Black Badge, the Ghost pairs a whisper-quiet cabin with effortless presence — ideal for business meetings in DIFC, Downtown Dubai arrivals, and weekend escapes along Palm Jumeirah.

Every booking includes a professional chauffeur and free delivery anywhere in Dubai, so your Ghost is ready at your hotel, villa, or DXB and DWC airport terminal. Reserve in minutes over WhatsApp, 24/7, with multilingual support. Need it for a wedding, a corporate event, or an airport transfer? Message us and we will confirm availability right away.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce Ghost in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Rolls-Royce Ghost rental in Dubai starts at AED 3,800 per day, the most accessible price in our fleet. Weekly and monthly rates are discounted; message us on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922 for an exact quote.

faqs.question: Is the Rolls-Royce Ghost available for rent with a driver in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Ghost rental can include a professional chauffeur, or you can self-drive. Chauffeur service suits weddings, corporate transfers and airport pickups; self-drive is available to qualifying renters with valid documents.

faqs.question: Do you deliver the Rolls-Royce Ghost across Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer free delivery across Dubai including Downtown, DIFC, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah and DXB airport, so the Ghost reaches your hotel, villa or office at your chosen time.

faqs.question: Can I rent a white Rolls-Royce Ghost for a wedding in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. A white Ghost is a popular Dubai wedding car; subject to availability we can arrange ribbon decoration and a chauffeur. Book early for peak wedding dates to secure your preferred colour.

faqs.question: What do I need to rent a Rolls-Royce Ghost in Dubai?
faqs.answer: You need a valid driving licence (UAE licence or passport plus International Driving Permit for visitors), Emirates ID or passport, and a refundable security deposit. Tourists are welcome to rent.
